full_description: Habit Tracker is a simple Android app that helps users track and maintain their daily habits. It allows users to set reminders and monitor their progress. With Habit Tracker, you can easily create and manage your daily routines, set customizable reminders, and view your progress over time. The app is designed to be easy to use and provides a clear overview of your habits, helping you stay motivated and focused on your goals. Whether you want to exercise more, read daily, or practice a new skill, Habit Tracker is the perfect tool to help you build positive habits and achieve your goals.
